title: Star Wars: A New Hope
overview: A farm boy joins a rebel alliance to rescue a princess and destroy a planet-killing weapon.

title: The Matrix
overview: A hacker discovers reality is a simulation and joins a fight against the machines that built it.

title: Terminator 2: Judgment Day
overview: A reprogrammed assassin protects a boy from a more advanced shape-shifting killer sent from the future.

title: Inception
overview: A thief who steals secrets via shared dreaming is hired to plant an idea instead.

title: Mad Max: Fury Road
overview: A drifter and a runaway warrior flee a tyrant across a post-apocalyptic desert.

title: The Dark Knight
overview: Batman, Gordon, and Harvey Dent confront an anarchist criminal known as the Joker.

title: Aliens
overview: A survivor returns to a colonized moon with marines to face the xenomorph hive.

title: Forrest Gump
overview: A simple man with a big heart witnesses and shapes decades of American history.

title: The Shawshank Redemption
overview: A banker imprisoned for a murder he didn't commit forges a friendship and plans an escape.

title: Schindler's List
overview: An industrialist saves over a thousand Polish Jews by employing them in his factory.

title: 12 Angry Men
overview: A juror works to persuade his peers that the evidence in a murder trial is not as it seems.

title: Casablanca
overview: A nightclub owner in wartime Morocco must choose between love and helping his old flame's husband escape.

title: Se7en
overview: Two detectives hunt a killer who uses the seven deadly sins as motifs.

title: The Silence of the Lambs
overview: An FBI trainee consults a captive cannibal to catch a serial killer skinning his victims.

title: Heat
overview: A detective and a master thief circle each other as a crew plans one last heist.

title: Memento
overview: A man with no short-term memory hunts the killer of his wife using notes and tattoos.

title: Prisoners
overview: After his daughter is abducted, a father takes the investigation into his own hands.

title: Gone Girl
overview: A man becomes the prime suspect in his wife's disappearance on their fifth anniversary.

title: Zodiac
overview: A cartoonist becomes obsessed with the unsolved Zodiac killings in 1970s San Francisco.

title: Groundhog Day
overview: A cynical weatherman is trapped reliving the same day until he learns to love it.

title: The Big Lebowski
overview: A laid-back slacker is dragged into a kidnapping plot after a case of mistaken identity.

title: Some Like It Hot
overview: Two musicians witness a mob hit and disguise themselves in an all-girl band to escape.

title: Airplane!
overview: A traumatized ex-pilot must land a passenger jet after the crew is incapacitated.

title: This Is Spinal Tap

title: Pulp Fiction
overview: Hitmen, a boxer, and a gangster's wife cross paths in interlocking Los Angeles vignettes.

title: Goodfellas
overview: A young man's rise and fall through the New York mob over three decades.

title: The Godfather
overview: The aging patriarch of a crime dynasty transfers control to his reluctant youngest son.

title: No Country for Old Men
overview: A welder finds drug-money in the desert and is hunted by a relentless killer.

title: Blade Runner
overview: A retired cop is forced to hunt down four replicants who've returned to Earth.

title: 2001: A Space Odyssey
overview: Astronauts travel to Jupiter with the sentient computer HAL after the discovery of an alien artifact.

title: Alien
overview: The crew of a commercial towing ship is stalked by a deadly creature after answering a distress signal.

title: Arrival
overview: A linguist is recruited to communicate with extraterrestrials whose ships have appeared worldwide.

title: Ex Machina
overview: A programmer is invited to evaluate the consciousness of his reclusive boss's humanoid AI.

title: Interstellar
overview: Astronauts travel through a wormhole seeking a new habitable world for humanity.

title: Children of Men
overview: In a future where humans can no longer reproduce, a man must escort the only pregnant woman on earth.

title: The Shining
overview: A writer hired as a winter caretaker at an isolated hotel descends into violent madness.

title: Get Out
overview: A young Black man visits his white girlfriend's family estate and uncovers a disturbing secret.

title: Hereditary
overview: After their reclusive grandmother dies, a family begins to unravel a sinister inheritance.

title: The Thing
overview: Antarctic researchers are infiltrated by an alien organism that perfectly imitates whatever it kills.

title: Rosemary's Baby
overview: A pregnant woman in a Manhattan apartment grows convinced her neighbors have sinister plans for her child.

title: Eternal Sunshine of the Spotless Mind
overview: A couple undergoes a procedure to erase each other from their memories after a painful breakup.

title: Before Sunrise
overview: A young American and a French woman meet on a train and spend a single night walking through Vienna.

title: When Harry Met Sally
overview: Two friends debate whether men and women can be platonic over twelve years of near-misses.

title: Spirited Away
overview: A girl trapped in a spirit world must work in a witch's bathhouse to free her parents.

title: Toy Story
overview: A cowboy doll must accept a flashy spaceman toy as his rival for a child's affection.

title: The Incredibles
overview: A family of undercover superheroes returns to action when a fan turned villain threatens the world.

title: Whiplash
overview: A young drummer enrolls at a cutthroat music conservatory under a brutal instructor.

title: Parasite
overview: A poor family schemes its way into employment with a wealthy household with unforeseen consequences.

title: La La Land
overview: A jazz pianist and an aspiring actress fall in love while pursuing their dreams in Los Angeles.

title: Moonlight
overview: Three chapters in the life of a young Black man growing up in a rough Miami neighborhood.

title: Whisper of the Heart
overview: A bookish Tokyo teenager investigates the boy whose name keeps appearing in her library books.

title: Drive
overview: A Hollywood stunt driver moonlights as a getaway driver and protects his neighbor from gangsters.

title: Sicario
overview: An FBI agent is enlisted by a shadowy task force to take down a Mexican cartel boss.

title: Whiskey Tango Foxtrot
overview: A copywriter takes a war-zone reporting job in Afghanistan and is transformed by the experience.

title: Coco
overview: A boy who dreams of being a musician travels to the Land of the Dead to meet his ancestor.

title: Knives Out
overview: A detective investigates the patriarch of a wealthy family found dead after his birthday party.

title: The Social Network
overview: A Harvard student builds a social network and is sued by friends and partners as it explodes.

title: Spotlight
overview: Boston Globe reporters investigate decades of cover-ups in the Catholic Church.

title: Rear Window
overview: A wheelchair-bound photographer suspects his neighbor of murder while spying through a telephoto lens.

title: Vertigo
overview: A retired detective with acrophobia is hired to follow a friend's wife and falls obsessively in love.
